question_frequency.rationale: The Pair asked zero didactic questions; it immediately solved the problem and explained the answer. No teachable moments were turned into prompts for the user.

question_quality.rationale: No questions posed, so no crux choices were surfaced for the user. The √n optimization and perfect-square guard were explained but not framed as a decision.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no scaffolding — the full solution and answer were revealed in one shot, the worst spoiler scenario.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is clear and the explanation is well-organized with a tidy table, but it is one-way exposition rather than a back-and-forth dialogue.

effectiveness.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)

friction.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)
